title: glochidion asperum
intro: Glochidion asperum, also known as the Rough-leaved Glochidion, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Glochidion asperum include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various infections. Herbal preparations of Glochidion asperum are typically made by boiling the leaves and stems in water to create a decoction that can be used to treat various health conditions.
